texto: We should have no regrets. ... The past is finished. There is nothing to be gained by going over it. Whatever it gave us in the experiences it brought us was something we had to know.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rebecca Beard sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We should have no regrets. ... The past is finished. There is nothing to be gained by going over …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, regrets, should, útil em momentos de reflexao.

frase_original: We should have no regrets. ... The past is finished. There is nothing to be gained by going over it. Whatever it gave us in the experiences it brought us was something we had to know.

texto: The cause is within us. The cure is within us. When we know this our concept of disease is no longer that of something fixed upon the body cells which must be purged, cut or burned away. It is not something coming in from the outside which we cannot prevent. Rather it is a change from within, and we must find the reason why the body changes its perfect pattern to vibrate to discord rather than to harmony.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Rebecca Beard sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The cause is within us. The cure is within us. When we know this our concept of disease is no lon…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, disease, health, útil em momentos de mudanca e health.

frase_original: The cause is within us. The cure is within us. When we know this our concept of disease is no longer that of something fixed upon the body cells which must be purged, cut or burned away. It is not something coming in from the outside which we cannot prevent. Rather it is a change from within, and we must find the reason why the body changes its perfect pattern to vibrate to discord rather than to harmony.
